ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Lemon, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: _Torsk_ (Gadus morhua) 55%, panering 45% (_vete_ mjöl, vatten, rapsolja, salt, potatisstärkelse, _vete_ dextros, solrosolja, socker, svartpeppar, citron, vitpeppar, lök, surhetsreglerande medel (E330)).
